## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and progress.](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 3 refreshes, 5 new articles last week; aiming for 25 new pieces](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [New strategy: Creating "parent articles" for industries, linking to more specific content](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Technical editor added to ensure accuracy and quality of content](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Tribe AI to provide list of key verticals to align content strategy with company focus](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Strategy

  - [Current stats: 57 published articles, refreshes ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [New approach: Creating "parent articles" for industries (e.g., "AI in Healthcare")](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Parent articles will link out to more specific, related content](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [Strategy has proven successful, with potential to outrank high-authority sites (e.g., Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Tribe AI to provide list of key verticals based on project data](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Will help align content with company focus and future website pages](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Content Management System (CMS) Questions

  - [Event date: Currently using blog creation date](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Author attribution:](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - ["Tribe" currently used, but person-specific attribution recommended for better SEO](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [Possibility of assigning different authors by vertical/category](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
      - [Challenge: Finding balance between credibility and team size constraints](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Read time: Recommendation to include rough estimate](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Content Topic Selection

  - [Jaclyn's feedback on topic selection:](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [Generally satisfied with current topics](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [Caution against controversial subjects (e.g., AI in law enforcement, deepfakes)](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [Trust in team's ability to identify ranking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Moving towards more focused, vertically-aligned content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tribe AI to provide list of key verticals (aim: today)](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Content team to produce 5 new articles and 5 refreshes this week](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Content team to send topics for approval by Friday, reflecting new verticals if possible](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to align with Tribe AI's focus and maximize growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/1s1txcUXs_kPbpT4brcTnuNXpssqVjWG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
